prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年石河子大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约37267名→20225名→19375名→27473名→20915名，整体波动较大。2021年因首次招生或数据口径原因 位次异常偏高（37267名），2022–2023年快速回升至2万名以内，2024年回落至27473名，2025年又回升至20915名。近3年（2023–2025）位次在1.9万–2.7万之间震荡，2025年基准 位次约20915名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021年68人、2022年68人、2023年60人、2024年60人、2025年76人、2026年76人（依据§7招生计划文件）。202 5年较2024年扩招16人（+26.7%），2026年与2025年持平。在海南省考生总数持续增长的背景下，计划持平意味着相对竞争压力有所上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学是国家211 工程重点建设高校、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第165名→2022年第157名→2023年第138名→2024年第136名→2025年第140名→2026年第135名，排名稳 步提升，学校综合实力和认可度不断增强；2022年声誉记录显示偏负面（宿舍改造问题），但近年无重大负面舆情。抖音热度排名第58位（较热），综合热度约 55万，主要传播内容为张雪峰推荐\"分数最低的211\"，这一标签有助于吸引中等分数段考生关注。未见明显投档断档记录；石河子大学在第五轮学科评估中无A -及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在农业、医学、师范等领域，整体学科实力在211高校中处于中后段，但作为新疆地区综合性大学，学科覆盖面较广。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化持续高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学推荐；会计/财务/审计推荐；师范/教育分化观望。海南省2026 年考生总数约78000人（较2025年67408人增长约15.7%），考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。；石河子大学位于新疆维吾 尔自治区，距海南省地理距离遥远，属于典型的跨省远距离报考。对于海南考生而言，地域偏好因素倾向于选择省内或邻近省份高校，石河子大学的地域吸引力相对有限，这在一 定程度上降低了报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动特征、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、海南省考生总数大幅增长（+15.7%）、学校软科排名稳步上升、地域偏远等 因素，预计2026年石河子大学在海南省综合类的最低录取位次将较2025年基准（20915名）小幅后移。主要驱动因素为：①考生总数大幅增加使分母扩大，同等百分位对应的位次数 字自然增大；②招生计划未同步扩招，相对竞争加剧；③地域偏远持续抑制报考热情。预测最低录取位次约21115名，波动区间20615–21615名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约21115名，区间20615–21615名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力报考方向，一档专业可冲刺但录取概率较低，三档专业作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（< 20615名）时可重点冲刺一档的会计学、审计学等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>21615名）时建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。石河子大学作为211高校性 价比较高，适合分数中等但希望获得211学历的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shihezi University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 37267 → 20225 → 19375 → 27473 → 20915, showing significant fluctuations. In 2021, due to first-time enrollment or data口径 reasons, the ranking was abnormally high (37267). It quickly recovered to within 20000 in 2022–2023, fell back to 27473 in 2024, and rose again to 20915 in 2025. In the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings oscillated between 19000 and 27000, with a baseline of approximately 20915 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan's comprehensive category: 68 in 2021, 68 in 2022, 60 in 2023, 60 in 2024, 76 in 2025, and 76 in 2026 (based on §7 enrollment plan document). In 2025, enrollment expanded by 16 students (+26.7%) compared to 2024, and 2026 remains the same as 2025. Against the backdrop of a continuously growing total number of examinees in Hainan Province, a flat plan implies increased relative competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a national key university under Project 211 and a Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 165th in 2021 → 157th in 2022 → 138th in 2023 → 136th in 2024 → 140th in 2025 → 135th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, reputation records showed slightly negative (dormitory renovation issues), but no major negative public opinion in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 58th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity around 550,000, mainly featuring Zhang Xuefeng's recommendation of "the lowest-scoring 211," a label that helps attract mid-score examinees. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University has no A- or above disciplines; its advantageous disciplines are mainly in agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, placing its overall discipline strength in the middle-to-lower segment among 211 universities. However, as a comprehensive university in Xinjiang, it has a broad disciplinary coverage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are recommended; Accounting/Finance/Auditing are recommended; Teacher Training/Education is divided with a wait-and-see approach. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), significantly expanding the examinee pool and intensifying overall competition. Shihezi University is located in the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region, geographically far from Hainan Province, representing a typical long-distance cross-province application. For Hainan examinees, geographical preference tends to favor universities within the province or neighboring provinces, so Shihezi University's geographical appeal is relatively limited, which to some extent reduces application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation characteristics of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan being flat compared to 2025, the significant increase in Hainan's total examinee count (+15.7%), the steady rise in Soft Science rankings, and the remote geographical location, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Shihezi University in Hainan's comprehensive category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline (20915). The main driving factors are: ① The substantial increase in total examinees expands the denominator, naturally increasing the ranking number corresponding to the same percentile; ② The enrollment plan has not expanded synchronously, intensifying relative competition; ③ The remote location continues to suppress application enthusiasm. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 21115, with a fluctuation range of 20615–21615.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 21115, range 20615–21615. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main application direction; Tier 1 majors can be attempted but have lower admission probability; Tier 3 majors serve as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (< 20615), focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors like Accounting and Auditing; for rankings near the upper limit (> 21615), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. As a 211 university, Shihezi University offers high cost-performance, suitable for examinees with moderate scores who aspire to obtain a 211 degree.
